hero.imageAlt: A professionally designed Pacific Northwest garden with layered plantings, stone walkway, and mature trees surrounding a craftsman home
hero.headline: Designed for the PNW. Built to Last.

intro.label: A design-forward studio, not a mow-and-blow crew
intro.body: A design-forward landscaping studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. From full landscape installs and hardscape to year-round maintenance — we build it right and keep it looking that way through every PNW season.

personas.label: Hardscape & Patios
personas.kicker: For the outdoor space that earns its keep

personas.label: Maintenance Plans
personas.kicker: For the property that stays beautiful

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a landscape estimate in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Tell us about your project and we'll return a budget range before any site visit.

zPatternRows.label: Drainage First
zPatternRows.headline: We design around your drainage problem, not past it.
zPatternRows.body: PNW drainage is the thing every landscaping quote should address first and most skip entirely. We assess slope, soil type, and existing drainage before we recommend a single plant or paver. A properly graded install lasts. One that ignores drainage doesn't.

zPatternRows.label: PNW Plant Selection
zPatternRows.headline: Plants selected for how they actually perform here.
zPatternRows.body: Not what's trendy in California or what the box store had on pallets this weekend. PNW-adapted species that thrive in our soil, our rain pattern, and our shoulder seasons — selected for year-round structure and color, not just the day of install.

zPatternRows.label: Hardscape Built Right
zPatternRows.headline: Patios and walls built to handle Seattle freeze-thaw.
zPatternRows.body: A paver patio that heaves by spring isn't a patio — it's a liability. Properly compacted sub-base, drainage aggregate behind retaining walls, and joint patterns that move with the season. The base prep is most of the job. We don't shortcut it.

zPatternRows.label: Year-Round Maintenance
zPatternRows.headline: Same crew, same property, consistent results.
zPatternRows.body: Maintenance plans with the same crew every visit — not whoever answered the phone this week. They know your property, they know your preferences, and they don't need instructions each time. Weekly, bi-weekly, and seasonal options.

footerCta.headline: Ready for a landscape that looks intentional all year?
footerCta.subhead: We'll be in touch within a few hours to schedule a site visit.
